embed.title: !community (admin)
embed.description: Manage a user's membership in area-security communities. Each community defines which geofence areas its members can select and an optional location restriction.

fields.name: View
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}community list` — list all configured communities
`{{prefix}}community show user:<id>` — show a user's current memberships
`{{prefix}}community show channel:<id>` / `name:<webhookname>` — same for channels/webhooks

fields.name: Add and remove
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}community add london user:<id>` — put this user in the "london" community
`{{prefix}}community remove london user:<id>` — remove
`{{prefix}}community clear user:<id>` — remove from every community

fields.name: How it relates to the rest of the bot
fields.value: Community membership is usually synced automatically from Discord roles (see the reconciliation settings in config.toml). Use `{{prefix}}community` as a manual override — e.g. for Telegram users, for webhooks, or when you need to grant access outside Discord.
